title: Feature Request: Ranked Choice List in Form

posts.author: kcastaneda (Kacey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would love to see a ranked choice option when building out a Form so that users can select their favorite and least favorite options given a specific list.
For example, if I were creating a board to schedule an All-Hands meeting, the selection choices would include Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday. I would like for the respondents to be able to rank their preferred day followed by second choice, third, etc.

What are you trying to achieve

Create a response option that allows respondents to rank their selections.
